---
title: Low-Latency Proactive Continuous Vision
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Yuxian Qiu
- Lele Chen
- Jingwen Leng
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3410463.3414650
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/low-latency-proactive-continuous-vision
journ: PACT
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
award: Best Paper Nominee
pub_number: 39
---
